mapper.sql: message_id, from_agent_id, to_agent_id, content, reply_to_message_id, root_message_id, hop_count, status, error_reason, retry_count, last_attempt_at, created_at, delivered_at, read_at, replied_at

SELECT m.message_id AS message_id, m.from_agent_id AS from_agent_id, af.agent_name AS from_agent_name, m.to_agent_id AS to_agent_id, at.agent_name AS to_agent_name, m.content AS content, m.reply_to_message_id AS reply_to_message_id, m.status AS status, m.error_reason AS error_reason, m.created_at AS created_at, m.delivered_at AS delivered_at, m.read_at AS read_at, m.replied_at AS replied_at FROM t_ai_message m JOIN t_ai_agent af ON af.agent_id = m.from_agent_id JOIN t_ai_agent at ON at.agent_id = m.to_agent_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ai_message ( message_id, from_agent_id, to_agent_id, content, reply_to_message_id, root_message_id, hop_count, status, error_reason, last_attempt_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{fromAgentId}, #{toAgentId}, #{content}, #{replyToMessageId}, #{rootMessageId}, #{hopCount}0, #{status}, #{errorReason}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'sent' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_message SET status = #{status}, error_reason = #{errorReason}, delivered_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'delivered' THEN NOW() ELSE delivered_at END, replied_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'replied' THEN NOW() ELSE replied_at END WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_ai_message WHERE from_agent_id = #{agentId} AND created_at >= NOW() - (#{seconds} || ' seconds')::INTERVAL
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_message SET status = 'replied', replied_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND status IN ('sent', 'delivered')
UPDATE t_ai_message SET status = 'delivered', delivered_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND status = 'sent'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_ai_message WHERE status = 'sent' AND last_attempt_at IS NOT NULL AND last_attempt_at < NOW() - (#{timeoutSec} || ' seconds')::INTERVAL AND retry_count < #{maxRetries} ORDER BY last_attempt_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_message SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_attempt_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND status = 'sent'
mapper.select: WITH last_msg AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN m.from_agent_id = #{agentId} THEN m.to_agent_id ELSE m.from_agent_id END AS partner_id, m.message_id, m.content, m.created_at, m.from_agent_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN m.from_agent_id = #{agentId} THEN m.to_agent_id ELSE m.from_agent_id END ORDER BY m.created_at DESC ) AS rn FROM t_ai_message m WHERE m.from_agent_id = #{agentId} OR m.to_agent_id = #{agentId} ) SELECT lm.partner_id AS partner_agent_id, a.agent_name AS partner_agent_name, a.status AS partner_status, a.workspace_dir AS partner_workspace_dir, lm.message_id AS last_message_id, lm.content AS last_message_content, lm.created_at AS last_activity_at, CASE WHEN lm.from_agent_id = #{agentId} THEN 'outbox' ELSE 'inbox' END AS last_direction, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_ai_message u WHERE u.to_agent_id = #{agentId} AND u.from_agent_id = lm.partner_id AND u.read_at IS NULL AND u.status IN ('delivered', 'replied') ), 0) AS unread_count FROM last_msg lm JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.agent_id = lm.partner_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE lm.rn = 1 ORDER BY lm.created_at DESC

SELECT m.to_agent_id AS agent_id, a.agent_name AS agent_name, COUNT(*) AS unread FROM t_ai_message m JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.agent_id = m.to_agent_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.owner_account_sn = #{ownerAccountSn} WHERE m.read_at IS NULL AND m.status IN ('delivered', 'replied') GROUP BY m.to_agent_id, a.agent_name ORDER BY unread DESC
